description: Style NoteUnderstated and classy, these shoes from enroute replicate the girly look for the Indian diva, in a low cut Mary Jane, with a heel. Wear this with tonal double pleated formal trousers and an understated colour happy shirt. You can also wear this with capris and tops. Comes with a shoe bag.Product DetailsBlack synthetic leather upper with slip-on style, a strap across the backfoot with a buckle closureLeather footbed with brandingTPU outsole, textured on the forefoot and a heelSizeHeel: 2& rdquo Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
